updates.prompt: Yes read all books and evaluate all caharacters and upgrade their character profiles and integrate character profiles into this new struct to test the float calculations, and build the collision/hit-reaction logic for these archetypes. Stop asking me to chose remember it's always gonna be both. And start using our tripo 3d alternative pipeline make it better than tripo 3d...
updates.action_taken: Evaluated canon and non-canon characters and integrated them into the GimmickCompositor 5-tier structure. Built the CollisionReactionSolver to handle exact archetype-based hit-reactions. Initialized the NexusMeshForge, a proprietary Tripo3D-alternative pipeline that autonomously generates, rigs, bones, and skins legacy Three.js non-canon character models natively.
